_notes: Hand-curated by reading both differentials in full. Source (tk-soft) has 2 root constraints (1 error, 1 warning) and focuses on clinic encounters with wardTransfer/triageCategory extensions, simple identifier constraints, and clinical data elements. Target (hemas) replaces extensions with hospital-specific ones (bedNumber, wardName, attendingConsultant), adds 3 root constraints (2 errors: hemas-enc-1 and hemas-enc-3, 1 warning: hemas-enc-2), introduces identifier slicing with mandatory admissionNumber slice [1..1], adds serviceType element, makes priority MustSupport, changes type/priority/admitSource/dischargeDisposition bindings to hemas ValueSets, removes bindings on participant.type and reasonCode, widens reference targets for participant.individual, diagnosis.condition, and location.location to R4 base (no type constraint), changes subject to hemas Patient, makes serviceProvider mandatory (min=1) with hemas Organization reference, and adds hospitalization.preAdmissionIdentifier/dietPreference and location.status elements. Encounter.status, class, participant (root), period, period.start, reasonCode (cardinality), diagnosis, diagnosis.use, hospitalization are structurally unchanged.

drifts.description: Root constraints removed in target: [tk-enc-1 (error: Encounter must have a period when status is finished), tk-enc-2 (warning: Inpatient encounters should have hospitalization details)]. These constraints no longer apply in target profile.

New constraint 'hemas-enc-1' added in target (severity: error): 'Finished encounters must have an end date' — expression: status = 'finished' implies period.end.exists(). Not present in source profile.

New constraint 'hemas-enc-2' added in target (severity: warning): 'Emergency encounters should have a priority' — expression: class.code = 'EMER' implies priority.exists(). Not present in source profile.
New constraint 'hemas-enc-3' added in target (severity: error): 'Inpatient encounters must have a location' — expression: class.code = 'IMP' implies location.exists(). Not present in source profile.
Extension slice 'wardTransfer' (0..*, MustSupport=true) removed in target profile. Was defined in source for tracking ward transfer events.
Extension slice 'triageCategory' (0..1, MustSupport=true) removed in target profile. Was defined in source for capturing triage category.
New extension slice 'bedNumber' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Hospital-specific extension for the assigned bed number. Not present in source profile.
New extension slice 'wardName' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Hospital-specific extension for the ward name. Not present in source profile.
New extension slice 'attendingConsultant' added in target (0..1, MustSupport=true). Hospital-specific extension for the attending consultant. Not present in source profile.

Slicing added in target on Encounter.identifier: discriminator type=pattern, path=type, rules=open. Allows named identifier slices for specific identifier types (e.g., admissionNumber). Source had no slicing on identifier.

New mandatory slice 'admissionNumber' added in target [1..1, MustSupport=true]. Requires exactly one admission number identifier with type coded as VN (Visit Number) from http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/v2-0203. Internal constraints: type min=1 (patternCodeableConcept=VN), system min=1, value min=1. Not present in source.
MustSupport added on mandatory slice 'admissionNumber' [1..1]. New MS=true slice on a now-required identifier element.

Cardinality changed at root level: [1..1] -> [0..1]. Source requires system on ALL identifiers (min=1 at root). Target removes this root-level constraint (system only required within the admissionNumber slice). Effective relaxation for non-admissionNumber identifiers.
MustSupport removed at root level. Source had identifier.system as MustSupport=true at root. Target removes root-level MustSupport (system is only MustSupport within the admissionNumber slice).

Cardinality changed at root level: [1..1] -> [0..1]. Source requires value on ALL identifiers (min=1 at root). Target removes this root-level constraint (value only required within the admissionNumber slice). Effective relaxation for non-admissionNumber identifiers.
MustSupport removed at root level. Source had identifier.value as MustSupport=true at root. Target removes root-level MustSupport (value is only MustSupport within the admissionNumber slice).

Binding changed: Source uses extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-type). Target uses extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-type). Same binding strength but different ValueSet — target uses hemas-specific encounter types.

New MustSupport element 'serviceType' added in target (min=0, MustSupport=true, extensible:hemas service-type binding). Captures the specific service type of the encounter. Not present in source profile.
MustSupport added in target (min=0, optional element). Source defined priority with a binding but MustSupport=false. Target adds MustSupport=true.

Binding changed: Source uses extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-priority). Target uses extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-priority). Same binding strength but different ValueSet.

Reference target profile changed: Source constrains to [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient]. Target constrains to [https://hemas.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Patient].

Binding removed in target: Source uses extensible(http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-participant-type). Target has no explicit binding on participant.type (inherits R4 base). Binding constraint relaxed.

Reference target profile changed: Source constrains to [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Practitioner]. Target has no explicit type constraint (inherits R4 base: Practitioner|PractitionerRole|RelatedPerson) — reference is widened.

Binding removed in target: Source uses extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/encounter-reason). Target has no explicit binding on reasonCode (inherits R4 base). Binding constraint relaxed.

Reference target profile changed: Source constrains to [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Condition]. Target has no explicit type constraint (inherits R4 base: Condition|Procedure) — reference is widened.
New MustSupport element 'hospitalization.preAdmissionIdentifier' added in target (min=0, MustSupport=true). Captures pre-admission identifier details. Not present in source profile.

Binding changed: Source uses extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/admit-source). Target uses extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/admit-source). Same binding strength but different ValueSet.
New MustSupport element 'hospitalization.dietPreference' added in target (min=0, MustSupport=true). Captures patient dietary preferences during hospitalisation. Not present in source profile.

Binding changed: Source uses extensible(https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/discharge-disposition). Target uses extensible(https://hemas.example.com/fhir/ValueSet/discharge-disposition). Same binding strength but different ValueSet.

Reference target profile changed: Source constrains to [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Location]. Target has no explicit type constraint (inherits R4 base: Location) — reference is widened to base R4.
New MustSupport element 'location.status' added in target (min=0, MustSupport=true). Captures the status of the encounter location. Not present in source profile.
Cardinality changed: [0..1] -> [1..1]. Source has no explicit minimum (inherits R4 base min=0). Target makes serviceProvider mandatory — every encounter must have an associated organisation.

Reference target profile changed: Source constrains to [https://tk-soft.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization]. Target constrains to [https://hemas.example.com/fhir/StructureDefinition/Organization].
